scripts.build:mac:universal: cd backend && npx --yes @tauri-apps/cli build --target universal-apple-darwin --bundles dmg,app
scripts.lint: npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm run lint:rust && npm run lint:trace
scripts.lint:deps:rust: if command -v cargo-deny >/dev/null 2>&1; then cargo deny --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml check; else echo "[lint:deps:rust] cargo-deny not installed; skipping (security.yml runs it in CI). Install: brew install cargo-deny"; fi
scripts.format: npm --prefix frontend run format && npm run format:rust
scripts.format:check: npm --prefix frontend run format:check && cargo fmt --manifest-path backend/Cargo.toml --check && prettier --check "*.md" "docs/**/*.md" ".github/**/*.md"
scripts.test: npm --prefix frontend run test && npm run test:rust
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run knip && npm run lint:md
scripts.fix: npm run format && npm run format:md && npm run lint:fix
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run test
scripts.verify:full: npm run check && npm run test:coverage && npm run test:rust && npm run e2e && npm run build && npm run lint:deps && npm run lint:deps:rust && npm run version:check
scripts.version: node scripts/sync-version.mjs && git add frontend/package.json frontend/package-lock.json backend/Cargo.toml backend/tauri.conf.json
